prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年综合科类最低位次分别为约2331名→2662名→6760名（物化生选科组异常值）→3001名→3448名。剔除2023年异常值后，近4年位次呈持续后移趋势，202 4年较2022年后移约339名，2025年较2024年再后移约447名，后移幅度逐年扩大，2025年基准位次约3448名；该校在海南省综合科类招生计划：2021年82人、202 2年82人、2023年78人、2024年82人、2025年88人、2026年79人。2026年计划较2025年减少9人，缩招约10.2%，招生名额收紧对竞争格局有一定影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中南财经政法大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续上升，2021年第65名→2022年第66名→2023年第67名→2024年第71名→2025年第62名→2026年第57名，排 名稳步提升反映学校综合实力增强，对高分考生吸引力有所增加；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为偏负面，主要涉及师德师风事件（教授考核争议），可能对部分 考生报考意愿产生轻微抑制；抖音热度排名第73位（综合热度约38万），评价为一般，未出现明显热度爆发或断档信号；历史投档异常记录中未见该校在海南有明显断档；第五轮学科评估中，法学获评A级、应用经济学获评A-，均为国内顶尖水平。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年专业热度数据显示，法学、财经类相关专业社会关注度保持平稳偏热；海南省考生总数从2021年52977人持续增长至2025年67408人，2026年 预计约78000人（较2025年增加约15.7%），考生规模大幅扩大将加剧本科批竞争海南本科批2021年466分→2022年471分→2023年483分→2024年483分→2025年480分， 近年稳中有降，未出现剧烈波动；学校位于湖北武汉，非本省高校，在海南无特殊地域偏好优势；该校在海南招生计划占总计划比例较小，无本地倾斜；法学为"五院四系"成员，应用经济学为财经类核心学科，对文科和财经方向考生有较强吸 引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年招生计划缩招约10.2%、海南省考生总数大幅增长约15.7%以及学校声誉偏负面等因素，竞争加剧是主导方向。，但考生大幅增加和声誉偏负面将推动位次进一步后移。预测2026年综合科类最低位次约3436名，位次区间2936–3936名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约3436名，区间2936–3936名。位次在区间下限（2936名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（法学类、国际法实验班、人文科学试验班）；位次在区间中段（约3400 名）的考生应以二档专业为主攻方向（财政学类、会计学、经济学等），兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（3936名）附近的考生建议以三档专业保底（精算学、管理科学与工程类 ），同时争取二档中位次要求较低的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the comprehensive subject category were approximately 2331 → 2662 → 6760 (anomaly in the Physics/Chemistry/Biology selection group) → 3001 → 3448. Excluding the 2023 anomaly, the rankings have shown a continuous backward trend over the past 4 years. In 2024, the ranking moved back by about 339 places compared to 2022, and in 2025, it moved back by another 447 places compared to 2024, with the magnitude of the backward shift expanding year by year. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 3448. The enrollment plan for this university in Hainan Province's comprehensive subject category: 82 students in 2021, 82 in 2022, 78 in 2023, 82 in 2024, 88 in 2025, and 79 in 2026. The 2026 plan is reduced by 9 students compared to 2025, a decrease of about 10.2%, and the tightening of enrollment quotas has a certain impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Zhongnan University of Economics and Law is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Best Chinese Universities has been steadily rising in recent years: 65th in 2021 → 66th in 2022 → 67th in 2023 → 71st in 2024 → 62nd in 2025 → 57th in 2026. The steady improvement in ranking reflects the enhancement of the university's overall strength, increasing its appeal to high-scoring candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving incidents related to teacher ethics (controversy over professor assessment), which may slightly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. The university's popularity on Douyin ranks 73rd (comprehensive popularity of about 380,000), rated as average, with no obvious signs of a popularity explosion or gap. Historical records of abnormal admissions show no significant gaps for this university in Hainan. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, law was rated A-level, and applied economics was rated A-, both at the top domestic level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Data on major popularity in 2026 shows that social attention to law, finance, and economics-related majors remains stable and relatively hot. The total number of candidates in Hainan Province has been increasing from 52,977 in 2021 to 67,408 in 2025, and is expected to be about 78,000 in 2026 (an increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025). The significant expansion in the number of candidates will intensify competition in the undergraduate batch. The undergraduate batch cutoff score in Hainan: 466 in 2021 → 471 in 2022 → 483 in 2023 → 483 in 2024 → 480 in 2025, which has been stable with a slight decline in recent years, without drastic fluctuations. The university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, not a local university in the province, and has no special regional preference advantage in Hainan. The university's enrollment plan in Hainan accounts for a relatively small proportion of the total plan, with no local bias. Law is a member of the 'Five Academies and Four Schools', and applied economics is a core discipline in finance and economics, which strongly attracts candidates interested in liberal arts and finance.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in historical rankings, the reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan by about 10.2%, the significant increase in the number of candidates in Hainan Province by about 15.7%, and the somewhat negative reputation of the university, intensified competition is the dominant direction. However, the large increase in candidates and the negative reputation will push the ranking further backward. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for the comprehensive subject category in 2026 will be approximately 3436, with a ranking range of 2936–3936.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 3436, with a range of 2936–3936. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit of the range (2936) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Law, International Law Experimental Class, Humanities and Social Sciences Experimental Class). Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 3400) should primarily target Tier 2 majors (Public Finance, Accounting, Economics, etc.), while also attempting Tier 1 majors. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit of the range (3936) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net (Actuarial Science, Management Science and Engineering), while also striving for Tier 2 majors with lower ranking requirements.
